opinion.h2: Rose Hudson BARNES, petitioner, v. Frances D. BOYD, Annie L. Brown et al.* No. 677.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. J. Franklin Fairleigh, of Louisville, Ky., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 55 S. Ct. 647, 79 L. Ed. --.
